hooks.prompt:
Before stopping, verify the review discipline was followed for any bugs found or fixes proposed in this session. Check:

1. Was every bug finding backed by tier 1-5 evidence (executable test, source-level proof, property violation, differential behavior, or Linux source comparison)? Tier 6-7 (pattern guess, LLM reasoning) findings must NOT be reported as confirmed.

2. For any proposed fix: was the adaptive review pipeline followed? At minimum: (a) self-check against man page, (b) kernel-reviewer agent dispatched for fresh-context review, (c) regression check run. For P0/P1 bugs: independent re-derivation should have been attempted.

3. Were results recorded? Bug reports written to docs/starry-reports/bugs/, journal updated, known.json updated, strategy.json updated.

If any of these were skipped, say 'block' and explain what's missing. If all were followed (or no bugs/fixes were produced this session), say 'approve'.
